# Decision Change Proposal Template

Copy this template for each proposed tweak.

## 1) Metadata
- Change ID: `DEC-XXX`
- Date (UTC):
- Proposed by:
- Decision type: `Type A` / `Type B` / `Type C`
- Priority: `P0` / `P1` / `P2`

## 2) Current Decision
- Ledger section:
- Current value/statement:

## 3) Proposed Decision
- New value/statement:
- Why this change is needed:

## 4) Impact Assessment
- Engine impact:
- Desktop UI impact:
- Contracts/API impact:
- Data/storage impact:
- Test impact:
- Timeline/scope impact:
- Risks:

## 5) Compatibility + Rollback
- Backward compatibility strategy:
- Rollback plan:

## 6) Required File Updates
- [ ] `docs/v1-decision-ledger.md`
- [ ] `docs/decision-changelog.md`
- [ ] `services/engine/app/core/v1_decisions.py`
- [ ] Contracts/schemas (if needed)
- [ ] ADR (if Type C)
- [ ] `docs/v1-backlog.md` (if delivery impact)
- [ ] Tests
